steps.title: Fastest path: graph or solve the equation
steps.content:
Type the equation into Desmos as written:
$$f \left(x\right)={x}^{2}-48x+2,304$$Graph it and use the visible intercept, root, or vertex the question asks for. The requested value is $1728$.

steps.title: Find the vertex x-coordinate
steps.content: The quadratic $f(x)=x^2-48x+2304$ opens upward because the coefficient of $x^2$ is positive, so its vertex gives the minimum. Use $$x=-\dfrac{b}{2a}=-\dfrac{-48}{2(1)}=24.$$

steps.title: Confirm the minimum
steps.content: Because the parabola opens upward, the vertex gives the least output value. The minimum value is 1728.
